label: THOXOS v6.0.0 COMPLETE SYSTEM DEMO [00] …
title: ThoxOS — AI Inference Sandbox | Thox.ai
innerText:
THOXOS v6.0.0 COMPLETE SYSTEM DEMO
[00]
ThoxOS v6.0 — kernel 5.15.148-thoxos-rt [PREEMPT_RT]
[01]
NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX 16GB — CUDA 12.3 · 1024 CUDA cores · 32 Tensor cores
[02]
cuQuantum SDK 24.03 — cuStateVec · cuTensorNet · cuDensityMat
[03]
TensorRT-LLM v0.9 — FP8 quantization engine loaded
[04]
Claude claude-sonnet-4-20250514 — model mapped to VRAM [OK]
[05]
MagStack™ pogo-connector — 4/4 nodes online · NFC ST25DV64K
[06]
Raft consensus — quorum 3/4 · leader node-0 · term 48
[07]
TPM 2.0 (Infineon SLB9670) — attestation chain verified ✓
[08]
Edge AI pipeline — vision router · LLM router · quantum router
[09]
UMA memory bus — 16GB unified · quantum/LLM shared heap
[10]
gRPC gateway :50051 · Ollama :11434 · Supabase edge runtime
[11]
NullClaw v0.1 — autonomous agent runtime · 678KB · <2ms boot
[12]
Lightpanda headless browser — CDP :9222 · MCP tools · 9× less RAM
[13]
Ollama — llama3.1:8b-q4_K_M loaded · Q4 KV cache · 15-25 tok/s
[14]
Agent Orchestrator :8300 — 4 subagents · MCP · SQLite+vector memory [READY]
[15]
Mesh Cognition Protocol — CfC network · Kuramoto sync · 256-byte hidden states
[16]
Distributed Inference — PP×TP hybrid · 4-node MagStack cluster · 14B active
▋
outerHTML:
THOXOS v6.0.0 COMPLETE SYSTEM DEMO
[00]ThoxOS v6.0 — kernel 5.15.148-thoxos-rt [PREEMPT_RT]
[01]NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX 16GB — CUDA 12.3 · 1024 CUDA cores · 32 Tensor cores
[02]cuQuantum SDK 24.03 — cuStateVec · cuTensorNet · cuDensityMat
[03]TensorRT-LLM v0.9 — FP8 quantization engine loaded
[04]Claude claude-sonnet-4-20250514 — model mapped to VRAM [OK]
[05]MagStack™ pogo-connector — 4/4 nodes online · NFC ST25DV64K
[06]Raft consensus — quorum 3/4 · leader node-0 · term 48
[07]TPM 2.0 (Infineon SLB9670) — attestation chain verified ✓
[08]Edge AI pipeline — vision router · LLM router · quantum router
[09]UMA memory bus — 16GB unified · quantum/LLM shared heap
[10]gRPC gateway :50051 · Ollama :11434 · Supabase edge runtime
[11]NullClaw v0.1 — autonomous agent runtime · 678KB · <2ms boot
[12]Lightpanda headless browser — CDP :9222 · MCP tools · 9× less RAM
[13]Ollama — llama3.1:8b-q4_K_M loaded · Q4 KV cache · 15-25 tok/s
[14]Agent Orchestrator :8300 — 4 subagents · MCP · SQLite+vector memory [READY]
[15]Mesh Cognition Protocol — CfC network · Kuramoto sync · 256-byte hidden states
[16]Distributed Inference — PP×TP hybrid · 4-node MagStack cluster · 14B active
▋
